description: Prohibit narrative roadmap mode — the structured-only end-state. Delete isNarrativeOwned/narrativeOwnedMessage and the 6 narrative gates (feature-writer.js:102, roadmap-gen.js:214/519, bin/compose.js:1164/1221, feature-validator.js:278 NARRATIVE_SUPPRESSED_KINDS). Clean removal (no prod users); structured is already the default for every non-narrative workspace, so removing the gates falls through to it — nothing new to build. MUST land AFTER COMP-ROADMAP-MIGRATE has moved forge-top (the sole narrative workspace) to structured and demonstrated validate-clean parity, else its ROADMAP breaks. Depends on COMP-ROADMAP-MIGRATE. Anchor: docs/plans/2026-06-21-roadmap-planning-model-design.md.
